allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\CLAUDE\\pdf-converter-backend"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 300,100; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::White\); $g.DrawString\("Hello PDF", \(New-Object System.Drawing.Font\("Arial",20\)\), [System.Drawing.Brushes]::Black, 20, 30\); $tmp = "$env:TEMP\\test_img.png"; $bmp.Save\($tmp, [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $r = curl.exe -s -X POST "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/convert/image-to-pdf" -F "file=@$tmp"; Write-Output $r)

PowerShell(cd "D:\\CLAUDE\\pdf-converter-backend"; $docx = "$env:TEMP\\test_doc.docx"; docker compose exec -T worker python -c "from docx import Document; d=Document\(\); d.add_heading\('Test',0\); d.add_paragraph\('Hello from Word to PDF'\); d.save\('/tmp/t.docx'\)" 2>&1; docker compose cp worker:/tmp/t.docx "$docx" 2>&1; $r = curl.exe -s -X POST "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/convert/word-to-pdf" -F "file=@$docx"; Write-Output $r)
